result.finding: The application is a cross-platform Java application targeting Java 17 (JVM). No OS-specific container base image, runtime identifier, or Kubernetes node selector is defined. It can run on any OS with a Java 17 JRE. The MySQL setup script (petclinic_db_setup_mysql.txt) references shell commands suggesting Linux/macOS as the primary deployment target.
evidence: No Dockerfile found — no container base image to determine OS
No Kubernetes nodeSelector or kubernetes.io/os label found
src/main/resources/db/mysql/petclinic_db_setup_mysql.txt contains shell commands suggesting Linux environment
No Windows-specific scripts (.bat, .cmd) found in project root
values: Target OS: Cross-platform (JVM-based, runs on any OS with Java 17)
Likely deployment OS: Linux (typical for Spring Boot production deployments)
